## Dataset license checklist

**All new datasets must pass this checklist before merge.** See the
[Adding new datasets](../blob/master/README.md#adding-new-datasets-licensing-requirements)
section of the README for full details.

- [ ] I have identified the **original source** of the dataset (URL,
      paper, repository, or upload page) and recorded it in the license
      file.
- [ ] I have identified the **exact license** of the dataset by reading
      it at the source. I have not guessed.
- [ ] The license **permits commercial use**. Non-commercial licenses
      (CC BY-NC, CC BY-NC-SA, CC BY-NC-ND, "research only", etc.) are
      not accepted without explicit maintainer approval and prominent
      labeling.
- [ ] The license **permits redistribution** from a BSD-licensed
      project (pyvista).
- [ ] I have added a **license file** alongside the dataset:
  - For a dataset in its own directory: a `LICENSE` file inside that
    directory.
  - For a loose file in `Data/`: a `<filename>.license` companion file.
- [ ] The license file includes:
  - [ ] Source URL
  - [ ] Verbatim license statement or link
  - [ ] Required attribution text (if any)
  - [ ] An `SPDX-License-Identifier:` line
- [ ] If the license is **ShareAlike** (CC BY-SA, ODbL, etc.), I have
      prominently flagged the ShareAlike obligation so downstream users
      are aware that derivatives must be re-shared under the same
      license.

## Declared license

- **SPDX identifier:** <!-- e.g. CC0-1.0, CC-BY-4.0, MIT, LicenseRef-... -->
- **Source URL:** <!-- where the dataset originated -->
- **Commercial use:** <!-- permitted / not permitted -->
- **Attribution required:** <!-- yes/no — if yes, what text? -->
